title: DebuggingSkill
description: Read-only diagnosis of migration pipeline failures (v2.0.0)

RootCauseCategory.description: Root cause category from the debugging taxonomy

FailureTypeHint.description: Optional hint about the failure type to narrow the search

EvidenceSource.description: Which data source this evidence item came from

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the evidence item

content.description: Redacted excerpt of the evidence. Secrets and PII are removed before inclusion.

relevance.description: How strongly this item supports the diagnosis (0.0 = irrelevant, 1.0 = definitive)

evidence.description: Evidence items supporting the diagnosis, ordered by relevance descending

recommended_fix.description: Human-readable description of the recommended remediation action

runbook_ref.description: Path or URL to the relevant runbook. Null if no runbook applies.

auto_recoverable.description: True only when confidence >= 0.90 AND the root cause has a known safe automated recovery. Signals the orchestrator that it may proceed without human approval.

affected_step_id.description: Migration step ID where the failure occurred. Null if not determinable.

title: DebuggingSkill Envelope

failed_step_id.description: Specific step ID that failed. Narrows the diagnostic search to this step.

failure_type.description: Optional hint about the failure type. Narrows the search space.

log_window_minutes.description: How many minutes back from failure timestamp to search in logs

output.title: DebuggingOutput
output.description: Diagnosis result returned by the debugging skill

read_only_constraint.description: This skill ONLY calls read-only API endpoints. It never calls POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE.

auto_recovery_policy.description: auto_recoverable=true only when confidence >= 0.90 AND category is in this list

evidence.content: Step step-extract-account-001 failed with error: 'Connection to db.internal:5432 timed out after 60s'
Step status: FAILED, duration_ms: 60042, records_processed: 0, error_code: NET_TIMEOUT

output.recommended_fix: Increase the database connection timeout in migration config (currently 60s). Check if db.internal is experiencing high load. Consider retrying the step after a 30-second backoff.

evidence.content: Gate source_completeness FAILED: null_rate 8.50% exceeds threshold 1.00% for entity Contact.Email

output.recommended_fix: Source Contact records have 8.5% null Email values — exceeds the 1.0% threshold. Investigate source data quality. Either fix source data or raise the null_rate_max threshold if business rules permit null emails.
